title: Makefile: use customizable env vars
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

I thought this was done before but apparently not.

@rhatdan @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat @vrothberg PTAL

comments.body: `make` should allow these values to be overridden by passing the desired values as parameters to make, e.g. `make PREFIX=/usr`.  There are many variable assignments in the Makefile that this patch doesn't touch, and if we're going to tweak how some are set, why not the rest?
@nalind ah you're right, my bad. Closing ...
